title: Enable app or features for a specific product or tier only

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Current state

Currently users can install any app on their account, regardless of what products they have signed up for. This can cause friction for apps that only work on specific products (eg Work Management or CRM).

Pain point

Some apps should only work on specific monday products, such as sales tools built for monday CRM. If an accounts installs the app but does not have a monday CRM subscription, the app will be useless for them.

Solution

Give developers ability to restrict their apps or features to specific products or tiers. This could be done on the app level or on the feature level.

On the app level, it would mean the app cannot be installed at all unless the account has a certain product (eg CRM).

On the feature level, it means the app would be installable but the specific feature would be disabled unless you had a CRM subscription.
